title: AzaleaPlays SMP
description: This is a modpack for the AzaleaPlays SMP
body:
# AzaleaPlays SMP

This Fabric modpack is for the AzaleaPlays SMP with the goal of giving players an easy way to enjoy the server. It is a vanilla+ style modpack meaning it is not required to join the server, but is optional and has some mods that interact with server mods and other clients.

## Main Mods

* Simple Voice Chat
  * Chat with other player near you
* Fabric Seasons
  * Not only do you experience the seasons, but you can see them too. This will change the colors of leaves as the seasons change.
* DeathLog
  * See where you died and what you had on you
* Sodium/Iris
  * Speed improvements and shaders
* Sound Physics Remastered
  * Sounds in the world bounce off walls and echo

## Other mods

* Chat Heads
  * Chat has small heads next to each message to help you recognize who is speaking
* Inventory Sorter
  * Sort your inventory with a button or a keypress by id or name
* Shulker Box Tooltip
  * Preview what's in a shulkerbox without having to place it and open it
* Zoomify
  * ZOOOOOMMMM

## Shaders

This modpack includes two shaders.

* Complementary Reimagined by [EminGT](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT): [Complementary Website](https://www.complementary.dev/).
  * We take responsibility for any problems or issues that may arise from the use of this shaderpack in this modpack.
* Rethinking Voxels by [gri573](https://modrinth.com/user/gri573): An edited version of Complementary [Rethinking Voxels Github](https://github.com/gri573/rethinking-voxels)
